title: Deprivation of Citizenship Orders (Effect during Appeal) Bill: factsheets
body: "These factsheets explain the measures in the bill, why they are needed and what impact they will have.   On 27 October 2025, the  Deprivation of Citizenship Orders (Effect during Appeal) Bill received Royal Assent and is now known as the Deprivation of Citizenship Orders (Effect during Appeal) Act 2025.  "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
